user_query: What kind of counseling and mental health services is Melanie interested in pursuing?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "Melanie")]/Session[atom(content =~ "counseling mental health services")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "counseling services") or atom(content =~ "mental health services")])
xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "Melanie")]/Session[atom(content =~ "counseling mental health services")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "counseling services") or atom(content =~ "mental health services")]
canonical_full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[content =~ "Melanie"]/Session[content =~ "counseling mental health services"]/max(Observation[content =~ "counseling services"], Observation[content =~ "mental health services"]))
canonical_xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[content =~ "Melanie"]/Session[content =~ "counseling mental health services"]/max(Observation[content =~ "counseling services"], Observation[content =~ "mental health services"])
